hooks.command: if command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1; then output=$(gitleaks detect --no-git 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"gitleaks detected secrets. Run /git-verify for details and remediation."}}\n'; fi; else findings=$(git diff $(git merge-base HEAD main 2>/dev/null || echo HEAD~1)..HEAD -p 2>/dev/null | grep -inE '^\+.*(AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|-----BEGIN (RSA |EC |DSA |PGP |OPENSSH )?PRIVATE KEY|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36}|xox[bsp]-[a-zA-Z0-9-]{10,}|glpat-[a-zA-Z0-9-]{20}|eyJ[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20,}\.eyJ)' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$findings" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Secrets pattern detected in diff (grep fallback). Run /git-verify for details."}}\n'; fi; fi
